chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Revision Application No.D- 04 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 01.04.2026. Mr. Aijaz Hussain Jatoi, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, D.P.G for State. = Counsel for the applicant states that he would be satisfied if this Criminal Revision Application is disposed of in the terms that directions may be met to the trial Court to frame the charge within a period of three weeks of the date of this order. Learned D.P.G has no objection. Accordingly, this Criminal Revision Application stands disposed of with direction to the trial Court to frame the charge within three weeks of the date of this order and proceed further in accordance with law. Such compliance report should be filed before this Court within stipulated period. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
